Gat soem request? CLICK ME TO VISIT MY STRAWPAGE!

But sometimes I either forget or didn't check my strawpage often so you can also request on the reviews too

Have a problem? Report it on the reviews! But I won't be able to fix when the bot is talking for you or sum, it's the bot not me, but to fix [if it works] you can delete the message and send it again or make a new chat

I don't accept dislike reviews when there's no reason to it. I will delete your review if it's just a blank dislike, hate words, idgaf if you say my bots suck, if so you shouldn't have chat with it anyway.
